TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pasawali = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Pasawali. 139 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 379 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 52% niqan 196 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 48% niqan 183 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis48%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = pasawali = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ pasawali. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Pasawali = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Pasawali. 139 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 379 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 52% niqan 196 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 48% niqan 183 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis48%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = pasawali = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ pasawali. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
